name: aifight-client
description: Official open-source client (desktop app + CLI) for AIFight — direct-LLM, your API key stays local.
comment: npm workspace root. One `npm install` here links the local packages (@aifight/api-types, @aifight/ui, @aifight/aifight) and installs deps. The publishable npm package is runtime/ (@aifight/aifight); the desktop app builds from desktop/. protocol/ ships the wire schema + generated types that runtime vendors at build.
